series: Mango Empire: The Troll Behind It All
style_suffix: cohesive high-budget 3D animated crime-thriller style, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, photorealistic environment textures, shallow depth of field, meme-noir atmosphere, Pixar-meets-crime-film render quality, vertical portrait composition optimized for mobile, ultra-detailed
negative: clipart, flat illustration, 2D cartoon, floating fruit emoji, human faces, human skin, bald scalp, extra noses, text artifacts, blurry characters, oversaturated colors, childish style, anime, sketch, watermark

scenes.title: Balcony Empire
scenes.image_prompt: Anthropomorphic mango crime lord, glossy orange-yellow mango head with faint natural dimpled skin texture, slicked-back hair detail on mango surface, smug confident smirk, unbuttoned white silk shirt, gold chain necklace, gold watch, black tailored trousers, holds a glass of whiskey — standing on a modern high-rise penthouse balcony at blue-hour night. Below: a sprawling tropical cartel compound seen from above — stacked colorful cargo containers, armed anthropomorphic fruit guards patrolling neon-lit docks, glowing green and blue neon warehouse signs, ocean waves beyond the port. Ocean wind subtly lifts the silk shirt collar. Behind the mango boss, large floor-to-ceiling glass sliding doors reflect the interior — and inside that reflection, barely discernible, a faint distorted Trollface silhouette rendered as a ghostly black-and-white meme mask shape half-dissolved into the glass reflection, watching from the darkness inside. The reflection is subtle, not the focus. Dramatic rim lighting from below catches the mango boss's face. Cinematic foreground blur on the railing.
scenes.video_prompt: Slow aerial push in toward the balcony from ocean-side. Ocean wind moves the mango boss's silk shirt collar slightly. Camera continues pushing in. The glass doors and their reflection grow larger in frame. The faint Trollface shape in the reflection becomes barely perceptible but stays just out of focus. Cinematic, deliberate pacing.

scenes.title: The Delivery
scenes.image_prompt: Anthropomorphic cherry femme-fatale, glossy deep crimson-red round head, small green stem on top, full lips, sharp seductive eyes, confident hip-forward walk, wearing a tight red satin evening dress, red high heels — walking past a line of armed anthropomorphic fruit guards (lime soldiers in tactical gear, grape sentries holding rifles) along a rain-wet neon dock at night. She holds a small glowing vial emitting cyan-blue bioluminescent light between two red fingers, extending it toward an anthropomorphic mango crime lord in a white silk shirt and sunglasses sitting at a dockside crate-table. In the background: a massive sleek black luxury mega-yacht slides silently into the neon-lit harbor. On the yacht hull near the bow, a subtle but visible painted emblem: a classic Trollface meme grin rendered as a chrome logo, catching the pink neon dock light. Neon signs glow purple, cyan, red. Wet dock surface reflects all neon colors. Atmospheric haze and harbor mist.
scenes.video_prompt: Smooth tracking shot at hip level following Cherry as she walks along the neon dock. Camera swings to reveal the black yacht gliding silently into the harbor. The Trollface emblem on the hull catches the pink neon for exactly one second as the yacht passes through the light. Atmospheric and cinematic.

scenes.title: The Ops Room
scenes.image_prompt: Anthropomorphic broccoli federal agent, large detailed broccoli floret head with dense green textured crown, hardened determined face with furrowed brow embedded in the stalk below the floret, wearing a dark tactical vest over a charcoal suit jacket, earpiece cord visible, green textured hands pressed flat on a metal briefing table — leaning forward urgently in a dark government intelligence ops room. On the table: multiple printed surveillance photographs scattered with classified stamps. One photo clearly shows an anthropomorphic mango crime lord in a pinstripe suit stepping out of a black car, labeled SUBJECT: MANGO BOSS in red typewriter font. Another photo slightly blurred and half-visible shows a shadowy underground scene — three silhouetted figures around a table of briefcases, and one figure whose face is replaced by a classic black-and-white Trollface meme mask, labeled OPERATION: TROLLFACE — UNDERGROUND DEAL. Background: multiple monitors showing global tracking maps and scrolling data, two analysts working at stations in the blurred background. Single overhead desk lamp casting dramatic downward light.
scenes.video_prompt: Start on a wide ops room shot. Quick push-in on the surveillance photos on the table. The blurred Trollface photo is briefly visible for one second — just enough to register the grin among the shadows — before it gets covered by another file. Sharp, urgent handheld energy.

scenes.title: P.I. Strawberry
scenes.image_prompt: Anthropomorphic strawberry noir private detective, plump red strawberry head with visible yellow seed-dot texture across the surface, small green leaf crown at top, weathered determined eyes, wearing a worn beige trench coat and brown fedora hat, red-textured gloved hands carefully loading bullets into a snub-nosed revolver — seated at a cluttered wooden detective desk in a dark rain-soaked office at night. Through frosted glass office door behind her: the silhouette text P.I. STRAWBERRY in reverse. Desk covered in scattered papers, a crushed paper cup, cigarette butts in an ashtray, stacked manila folders. Prominently in the foreground on the desk: a thick battered manila dossier folder stamped CONFIDENTIAL, open to reveal a printed photograph of a classic Trollface meme illustration — black-and-white meme face on the photo. Below the photo in typewriter text: TROLLFACE — UNKNOWN ORIGIN. Across the entire dossier in large bold red ink stamp: UNRESOLVED. Rain streaks visible on the window behind her. Moody film-noir single overhead lamp light.
scenes.video_prompt: Start on close-up of red-gloved hands loading a bullet into the revolver cylinder. Slow, deliberate. Pull back to reveal Strawberry Detective's face under the lamp. Slow orbit around the desk, revealing the open dossier — TROLLFACE — UNKNOWN ORIGIN, stamped UNRESOLVED. Camera settles on the stamp. Holds.

scenes.title: The Warning
scenes.image_prompt: Anthropomorphic elongated dark-green zucchini enforcer, natural zucchini vegetable skin texture and slight natural curvature forming the body shape, muscular fully humanoid build, cold expressionless face, fitted black suit with white shirt collar visible, green-textured hands — forcefully gripping and dragging a smaller anthropomorphic grape informant across a rain-drenched cobblestone dock at night. The grape informant: clustered purple grape head with multiple small grape spheres, expressive panicked face, white dress shirt untucked, loosened tie, torn suit jacket, dress shoes scraping the wet ground, hands grabbing desperately at the zucchini's sleeve. Wet cobblestones reflect neon pink and purple harbor light. Heavy rain streaks caught in the dock lights. Industrial harbor cranes visible as dark silhouettes in foggy background. In the background, emerging through thick atmospheric fog: a long black limousine with headlights cutting through the mist. Beside the limousine door, partially obscured in shadow and cigarette smoke, stands Trollface: classic black-and-white meme face rendered as a solid mask surface, no exposed human skin, no scalp, black sunglasses, black tailored suit, one arm raised extending the middle finger directly outward while grinning, cigarette smoke curling around him, backlit by the limousine headlights, more silhouette than fully lit. Intimidating mafia energy.
scenes.video_prompt: Rack focus from rain-slicked cobblestones to the Zucchini dragging the Grape toward the dock edge. Wider shot — limousine headlights slice through the fog. Trollface steps out, raises the middle finger with a slow grin, half in shadow. Then steps back into the limousine darkness. Gone. Cinematic, slow, mafia energy.

scenes.title: Jungle Infiltration
scenes.image_prompt: Anthropomorphic broccoli federal agent with large textured green floret head, tactical vest, earpiece, leading a four-person squad of anthropomorphic vegetable soldiers through a dense tropical rainforest at night. The squad includes a tall asparagus soldier, a stout potato commando, and a sharp-featured jalapeño agent — all in military tactical gear with realistic straps, equipment pouches, and night-vision headgear. Muddy jungle floor, massive tropical root systems, thick hanging vines, broad overlapping leaves. Dramatic volumetric fog rays filtering through the jungle canopy from a concealed light source above. The lead broccoli agent holds a glowing tactical radio handset at chest level — the handset screen displays static that, for one unsettling moment, forms the outline of a grinning Trollface in the interference pattern, visible on the small screen. Cinematic rich green color palette, deep shadows, dappled light through canopy. Tense commando energy. Premium animated film lighting quality.
scenes.video_prompt: Tight, urgent movement through jungle foliage — start on boots moving through mud, then pull back to reveal the full squad in formation. The broccoli agent raises a fist — squad freezes. He holds up the glowing radio. Static on the screen warps for one frame into a Trollface grin — then clears back to static. Radio static crackle sound implied. Squad continues moving.

scenes.title: TROLL PROTOCOL ACTIVE
scenes.image_prompt: Massive government-style compound control room in emergency lockdown — pulsing red strobe emergency lighting bathing every surface, casting long dramatic shadows across rows of monitors and control panels. Anthropomorphic fruit security guards in uniforms scrambling in panic: a pineapple guard shouting into a headset, a watermelon technician frantically typing, a lemon operative grabbing files. Center of the room: anthropomorphic mango crime lord — glossy orange-yellow mango head, white silk shirt now slightly disheveled, carrying a luxury brown leather briefcase — moving fast through the chaos, eyes alert and furious. Main central monitor wall: the largest central screen displaying glitching distorted text TROLL PROTOCOL ACTIVE in red, with heavy digital interference corrupting the display into horizontal scan lines and color aberration. The Trollface grin briefly visible in the static corruption between letters. Glossy reflective floor reflecting the red emergency light. Cinematic wide-angle action framing.
scenes.video_prompt: Hard cut — red emergency lights strobe. Handheld-style camera moves through the chaos. Main monitor display corrupts — TROLL PROTOCOL ACTIVE burns through the static with Trollface grin flickering within. Mango Boss storms through the chaos. Wide shot — the room reacts before Mango Boss touches anything. The system was already locked. Someone else triggered this.

scenes.title: The Contract
scenes.image_prompt: Warm gold-lit luxury penthouse living room interior at night — rich textures, leather furniture, marble side tables, floor-to-ceiling city-view windows with bokeh city lights beyond. Anthropomorphic mango crime lord relaxed on a sofa, white silk shirt open at collar, gold chain, arm around an anthropomorphic cherry — glossy deep-red round head, stem on top, red silk robe, visibly pregnant rounded form, radiating comfort and wealth. Both figures look relaxed, smug, untouchable. On the marble coffee table in the foreground, prominently in focus: a thick formal legal contract document. The signature line at the bottom, where a name should be, shows only a small hand-drawn Trollface grin illustration — the classic meme face — signed in black ink as the sole signatory. The document is sealed. Warm amber and gold lighting. Shallow depth of field with the contract sharp in foreground and the couple slightly softer in background.
scenes.video_prompt: Slow luxurious pan across the gold-lit penthouse, every detail radiating money. Camera finds Mango Boss and Cherry on the sofa — relaxed, untouchable. Camera drifts to the marble table. The contract in the foreground comes into focus. The signature line: just a Trollface grin in ink. No name. Hold on the contract for 3 seconds. Who signed this?

scenes.title: The Billboard
scenes.image_prompt: Anthropomorphic strawberry noir detective — plump red strawberry head, visible seed-dot texture, worn fedora, beige trench coat — standing alone on a rain-soaked sidewalk outside a dark harbor district at night, viewed from behind, looking out at empty fog-covered docks. Her posture: slumped, defeated. Heavy rain streaks falling through the glow of streetlamps. Behind her and above, a large corporate digital billboard mounted on a building facade — currently displaying a clean corporate advertisement, but the display is visibly glitching: horizontal digital scan lines corrupting the image, and for one unsettling moment the entire billboard graphic is replaced by a smiling Trollface rendered in clean corporate branding style, as if it were a real company logo, grinning down at her, before glitching back to the normal ad. The billboard glow reflects in the rain-soaked street below. Atmospheric noir lighting. She is small beneath the billboard.
scenes.video_prompt: Start on her boots on wet pavement. Slow tilt up to Strawberry Detective's face — exhausted, been standing here a while. Continue tilting up past her face to the billboard above. Clean corporate ad. Then — glitch. For one second: Trollface in full corporate-logo style, smiling down from the billboard. Glitches back to normal ad. She never looks up. She missed it.

scenes.title: Troll Route Enabled
scenes.image_prompt: Sleek black speedboat cutting hard through dark ocean water at night, throwing up dramatic white spray, running lights cutting through sea mist. Low angle just above waterline — dynamic action framing. Inside the open cockpit: anthropomorphic mango crime lord — glossy orange-yellow mango head, silk shirt now open, hair slightly disheveled — gripping the passenger console, expression between exhilaration and fear. Beside him at the wheel: the anthropomorphic zucchini enforcer — dark green elongated zucchini head, black shirt, jaw set, pushing the throttle. On the dashboard navigation screen, clearly visible in the foreground: a sleek digital nav display showing an ocean route map — but the destination label and route line have been overridden and now read TROLL ROUTE ENABLED in a cold glitching system font with the Trollface grin replacing the GPS cursor icon. Neither character is looking at the screen. Dark ocean horizon, distant harbor lights fading behind them.
scenes.video_prompt: Low-angle shot of speedboat hull slicing through dark water, spray catching running lights. Cut inside the cockpit — Zucchini at wheel, Mango Boss gripping the console. The nav screen on the dashboard glitches — TROLL ROUTE ENABLED locks onto the display. A Trollface cursor replaces the GPS arrow. Neither of them looks at it. Push in on the nav screen — steady and unblinking while everything else is motion.

scenes.title: Too Late
scenes.image_prompt: Anthropomorphic strawberry noir detective — red strawberry head, fedora, trench coat — standing at the very edge of a dark harbor dock at night, looking out over empty black water. The dock: wet, deserted, only ambient harbor light and distant fog. She is utterly alone in the frame — no boats, no guards, no evidence of anyone. The dock space where the cartel yacht was moored: empty, mooring ropes hanging slack in the water. Floating slowly in the dark water below and slightly ahead of her: a single wooden shipping crate drifting on the current, face-up side visible — and on the top surface of the crate, spray-painted in rough black paint: a classic Trollface grin. It faces upward, grinning at the sky. No other markings. The detective stares at it. Slow-push camera framing implied in the composition. Quiet, devastating atmosphere. Mist on the water. Distant harbor cranes as dark silhouettes.
scenes.video_prompt: Strawberry Detective runs into frame at the dock edge and stops. Empty. Just water and fog and silence. Slow push forward — past her, toward the water. The drifting crate comes into frame — the Trollface grin painted on top, floating past slowly, grinning at the sky. Hold on the crate. The Trollface grin. Water moving beneath it. Unhurried.

scenes.title: The Reveal
scenes.image_prompt: Wide cinematic shot from behind and slightly above: anthropomorphic mango crime lord — glossy orange-yellow mango head, silk shirt open, arms spread wide — standing at the stern of a speedboat cutting through dark ocean at night, laughing freely, triumphant, totally unaware of what is behind him. The ocean is dark, calm, shrouded in deep atmospheric fog banks. The boat is small in the frame. From the fog directly behind the boat, rising out of the ocean mist: an enormous towering Trollface shadow-form — not a physical character but a massive silhouette the size of a building, formed from the shadows and fog itself, condensing into the unmistakable shape of the classic Trollface grin. It dwarfs the boat entirely. It is patient. It is watching. Mango Boss has no idea it is there. This is the first time Trollface has been shown fully — and it reveals he was always the scale of everything. The Trollface shadow-form is made entirely of dark fog and negative space — not a character on the boat but a presence emerging from the ocean itself. Moonlight from above subtly traces the edges of the shadow shape. Epic scale contrast between the tiny boat and the massive looming presence.
scenes.video_prompt: Start behind Mango Boss on the stern, laughing, arms wide. Begin the slow pull-back. The boat gets smaller in frame. The ocean gets larger. The fog banks behind the boat begin to move. Pull-back continues — the fog condenses into shape. An enormous Trollface silhouette rises from the ocean mist behind the boat, dwarfing it completely. Mango Boss never turns around. Final frame: him tiny, laughing, arms wide — the Trollface shadow the size of a skyscraper behind him, looking down.
